title: Yakchancement patch
description: A patch for Enchancement that tweaks the custom durability removal logic to only apply to enchanted tools
body:
Tweaks the durability removal logic of Enchancement to only apply to enchanted tools, or to any item in the `enchancement:no_durability` tag. This tag was added as a foil to Enchancement's own `enchancement:retains_durability` tag and is meant for items that should not have durability at all but lack enchantments.

The default values for this tag include brush, flint and steel, carrot and warped fungus on a stick, and elytra. This can be tweaked with a datapack.
